prompt: Byzantine mosaic style illustration, vertical Pinterest format. Saint Gregory Palamas depicted as a traditional Byzantine mosaic — golden tesserae background, the saint in dark bishop robes with white omophorion and crosses, holding an open gospel book. Divine uncreated light radiates from him as concentric circles of golden and white tesserae. Around him: four smaller mosaic medallions containing symbols — a book, a scroll, a candle, a mountain (Athos). Rich deep colors: gold, lapis lazuli blue, deep burgundy red, emerald green, ivory white. Visible mosaic tile texture throughout — small square tesserae with gaps between them. Decorative geometric border pattern in mosaic style. Arched top composition like an apse. No text. Authentic Ravenna/Constantinople mosaic aesthetic.
